_notes: Diagonal = 14 c1v subsystems (SS1..SS14). Row = sender/provider, Column = receiver.
Cell (i,j) records what i provides to j. Request/response pairs appear in mirrored cells (upper and lower triangle).
External actors are NOT rows/columns (per KB) — they live in external_interfaces.
Every cell is driven by an M5 EC budget and/or an M3 informal interface (I.INT.x / I.EXT.x / I.UI.x).

project.name: c1v Dual-Mode Platform — N2 Interface Chart

subsystems.name: Founder Web UI
subsystems.description: Intake conversation, spec review, quick-start trigger.

subsystems.name: Session Manager
subsystems.description: Holds per-founder mode (Cloud default / Local opt-in) + auth + routing.

subsystems.name: LLM Provider Layer
subsystems.description: Routes across Anthropic / OpenAI / local model endpoints.

subsystems.name: Prompt Cache
subsystems.description: Claude prompt-caching layer + local embedding cache.

subsystems.name: Traceback Store
subsystems.description: Citation cache + vendor-doc fetcher (internal cache↔fetcher invalidation).

subsystems.name: CLI Bundle Emitter
subsystems.description: Packaging + signing + delivery of CLI bundle (SKILL.md + CLAUDE.md + MCP).

subsystems.name: Probe SDK
subsystems.description: Runs inside customer system; emits bounded-overhead metrics.

subsystems.name: Metric Store
subsystems.description: Time-series storage for aggregated metrics (60min window).

subsystems.name: Recommendation Engine
subsystems.description: Consumes metric deviations + produces cited recommendations.

subsystems.name: Auth / Credential Vault
subsystems.description: Session tokens, customer API credentials, rotation.

interfaces.name: Founder auth + mode select
interfaces.data: Login credentials, mode selection (Cloud/Local), intake intent. Drives session boot.

interfaces.name: Session state + UI stream
interfaces.data: Server-sent events: session bound, intake turn payload, spec preview, progress deltas. 50ms streaming cadence (EC16).

interfaces.name: Dispatch request (locked mode)
interfaces.data: Authenticated principal + locked mode + intake payload. MUST include mode lock before parallel dispatch (EC5↔EC6 roof resolution).

interfaces.name: Agent run state
interfaces.data: Per-run status, agent counts (≤5), tokens consumed (≤8000/call), completion/failure events.

interfaces.name: Cache lookup
interfaces.data: Prompt hash + cache key. Attempt first; fallthrough on miss. Target ≥70% hit rate rolling 24h (EC7).

interfaces.name: Cache hit/miss response
interfaces.data: Cached completion on hit; miss signal otherwise. Determines whether SS4 is called.

interfaces.name: LLM call
interfaces.data: Prompt + tool set + context (≤8000 tokens, EC8). Cache-miss only. Routed per session policy (EC5).

interfaces.name: Completion / tool calls
interfaces.data: Model completion, tool calls, usage metadata. Streamed to UI via SS2→SS1.

interfaces.name: Routing policy write
interfaces.data: Per-session routing policy (provider preference, temperature, local-mode flag). EC5 target = per-session (2).

interfaces.name: Cache-assisted call
interfaces.data: SS5 forwards cache-qualified prompts to SS4 with prefix reuse hints. Part of the ≥70% hit-rate pipeline (EC7).

interfaces.name: Generate spec request
interfaces.data: Intake-approved requirements → spec generation request (Mermaid v1, EC12).

interfaces.name: Spec draft + review signal
interfaces.data: Draft spec URI + pending-review flag. Gated on citation check (IF-13/IF-14).

interfaces.name: Citation check request
interfaces.data: Per-claim source lookup batch. Hard floor: every claim must resolve. 100% or emission blocked (EC10).

interfaces.name: Traced citations
interfaces.data: Resolved citations with TTL=24h (EC9); unresolved → spec emission blocked.

interfaces.name: Emit CLI bundle
interfaces.data: Approved spec URI → emit SKILL.md + CLAUDE.md + MCP tool defs. ≤5MB bundle (EC14). Only fires after IF-12 review.

interfaces.name: Emit receipt + signature
interfaces.data: Bundle signature hash, VCS commit ref, success/failure status. Feeds audit trail (IF-24).

interfaces.name: Probe payload
interfaces.data: Per-probe metric payload. ≤4KB (EC3). ≤6 probes/min (EC1). Batch ≥50 or time-flush after aggregation window (EC4).

interfaces.name: Backpressure + config
interfaces.data: Reject-on-violation responses, overhead-budget backpressure, collector-side SDK config (probe frequency + batch size).

interfaces.name: Aggregated write
interfaces.data: 60-minute-window aggregates (EC2) written to time-series store.

interfaces.name: Metric read + deviation
interfaces.data: Query aggregated series for deviation detection. Pull model (not push).

interfaces.name: Citation lookup for recs
interfaces.data: Citation resolution for recommendation claims (reuses SS7 cache).

interfaces.name: Cited refs for recs
interfaces.data: Traced citations (24h TTL).

interfaces.name: Recommendation feed-back
interfaces.data: Cited recommendation → next-iteration spec candidate (feedback loop from F.6→F.2).

interfaces.name: Audit log write
interfaces.data: All orchestration events, spec approvals, CLI emissions, mode switches. 90d retention (EC18).

interfaces.name: CLI emission audit
interfaces.data: Bundle id, hash, signer, VCS commit, timestamp.

interfaces.name: Probe rejection audit
interfaces.data: Overhead-violation rejections logged for compliance evidence (I.EXT.9).

interfaces.name: Session token issue
interfaces.data: Signed JWT on auth success; mode claim + role claims.

interfaces.name: Token refresh / rotate
interfaces.data: Rotation trigger at 90d cadence (EC17).

interfaces.name: Provider credentials
interfaces.data: Per-provider API keys (Anthropic/OpenAI) + local-mode flag. Vaulted; rotated per EC17.

interfaces.name: Probe credentials
interfaces.data: Read-only handles to VCS + Observability (I.EXT.3, I.EXT.4). Write-scope grants rejected (UC11).

interfaces.name: Spec review approvals
interfaces.data: Founder approvals/edits to draft spec. Gates IF-15 (CLI emission).

interfaces.name: Spec preview render
interfaces.data: Rendered Mermaid artifacts for in-UI review (intake step 3/5 — EC13).

external_interfaces.data: I.UI.1-4 — bidirectional HTTP/SSE: idea prompts, intake Q&A, spec approvals, recommendation consumption, org/seat provisioning.
I.EXT.1 — OIDC/SAML inbound-auth. Read-only scope mandatory for customer-system connections.
I.EXT.2 — HTTPS JSON prompts → completions/embeddings/tool calls. Fallback chain per CC.R07. Local-mode bypass per Privacy Local opt-in.
I.EXT.3 (write) / I.EXT.7 — signed artifact commit (SKILL.md + CLAUDE.md + MCP tool defs) to customer VCS.
I.EXT.10 + I.EXT.4 — read-only probe handles. MAX_CUSTOMER_SYSTEM_OVERHEAD_PCT=2% enforced via EC1/EC3/EC4.
I.EXT.5 — HTTPS+RAG retrieval of vendor specs, RFCs, standards. Refresh cadence 7d (EC11).
I.EXT.9 — evidence exports (SOC2/HIPAA/GDPR/PCI-DSS). v1 = operational audit; deeper evidence deferred to v2 per M4 D3.
I.EXT.8 — GH Actions / CircleCI hooks: spec as gate + acceptance criteria.
I.EXT.6 — vendor APIs (AWS/GCP/Azure) for service catalogs + SLAs (consumed during extraction).
I.EXT.7 — signed artifact + receipt delivered to founder's IDE (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.).

system_flows.name: Founder Intake → Spec → CLI Emission (5-step Quick Start)
system_flows.description: I.UI.1/I.INT.1/I.INT.2/I.INT.3/I.INT.4 realized end-to-end. Founder enters intake, session dispatches agents, spec drafted, review approved, CLI emitted.

system_flows.name: Agent LLM Call with Cache
system_flows.description: Cache lookup (IF-05/06) first; on miss SS5→SS4 cache-assisted call (IF-10) returns via IF-08. Target ≥70% cache hits (EC7).

system_flows.name: Probe → Aggregation → Store
system_flows.description: Customer-side probe → collector aggregates at 60-min window → time-series store. Overhead enforcement at SS10 boundary (IF-18).

system_flows.name: Deviation → Cited Recommendation → Feedback
system_flows.description: I.INT.6+I.INT.8 realized: deviation detected from aggregates, citations fetched, recommendation fed back to orchestrator for next-iteration spec.

system_flows.name: Citation-Gated Spec Review
system_flows.description: IF-13/14 citation check (100% floor) → draft returned to SS6 → rendered to founder (IF-32) for approval.

control_loops.name: Agent ↔ Cache ↔ LLM Call Loop
control_loops.description: Cache lookup → hit returns cached completion OR miss triggers SS4 call. Closed loop on every agent step. High-stakes: governs EC7 (70% hit) and EC8 (8000 tokens).

control_loops.name: Spec Generation ↔ Traceback Citation Loop
control_loops.description: Every claim in the spec must resolve to a citation. EC10 hard floor (100%); emission blocked if any claim unresolved. EC9↔EC11 TTL/refresh coordination lives inside SS7.

control_loops.name: Probe ↔ Collector Backpressure Loop
control_loops.description: Collector sends backpressure + config updates; SDK self-throttles. Resolves EC1↔EC2 and EC2↔EC4 roof negatives (joint tuning + time-based flush).

control_loops.name: Recommendation ↔ Traceback Loop
control_loops.description: Recommendation Engine requests citations, receives cited refs. Every rec claim must resolve in SS7 cache before feeding back to SS3. Part of F.6→F.2 loop from FFBD.

control_loops.name: Session ↔ Credential Rotation Loop
control_loops.description: Session Manager requests rotation at 90d cadence (EC17); vault issues new token. Operational hygiene loop.
